$comment: Feature pillars per docs/AGENTS.md. The frontend uses these to generate nav + landing tiles; the backend uses them in audit-event types.

features.name: Region Atlas
features.summary: Versioned region profiles with semantic-aware diff.

features.name: JJSCAN+
features.summary: JCL static analysis with reason-tagged dispositions.

features.name: ABEND Archaeologist
features.summary: SYSLOG + source triangulation with confidence tiers.

features.name: Confidence Score
features.summary: 0–100 readiness gauge composed across the other three.

features.name: Review Queue
features.summary: Real-time team approval with mobile fallback.
